diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Distribution Reward Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [Active Instances Directory](ef465153-3408-49f2-8b39-761c445e7a8a), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [Hub Data Repository](aad36c3f-431d-4a1d-942b-a583805618c1).
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes
